title: Trading Cards Resource Pack
description: Give your server Trading Cards more personality with unique design
body:
# Trading Cards Resource Pack
You can use this Resource Pack without the plugin by the same name, but it is reccomended.

## How to have a card with the custom model
Type in the chat `/give @s paper[minecraft:item_model="tradingcards:card"]` and you'll get a paper item with the model of a blank card.

**You are allowed**, as this resource pack is and will forever be under the Public Domain, and encouraged **to download and edit the RP** to your fitting (and your trading cards customization on the plugin!).
